zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强
zh.content:
短期价格围绕77.4窄幅震荡，略低于日内高点，整体维持高位整理结构，市场多空博弈加剧但未破位

SMA20位于76.23形成动态支撑，MACD保持正值动能，趋势偏多但未加速，显示上涨仍在健康延续阶段

支撑关注77.0与76.2区域，阻力集中78.0附近，若有效突破78.0将打开短线上行空间并强化趋势延续

操作建议回踩支撑不破轻仓做多，跌破76.9则短线止盈观望，控制风险等待新一轮方向选择确认

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading around 77.4, showing a mild intraday decline but overall stability within a tight range. Price action remains relatively compressed between 77.2 and 77.8, indicating short-term consolidation after recent volatility. The broader structure still leans slightly constructive as higher lows are forming above the 76 region, suggesting buyers are gradually defending dips despite a lack of strong directional momentum.

The MACD reading at 0.95 suggests underlying bullish momentum, though the absence of a signal line limits full confirmation of trend strength. Price trading above the 20-day SMA near 76.23 reinforces a short-term bullish bias, indicating buyers remain in control on pullbacks. However, momentum appears to be flattening, reflecting consolidation rather than a strong breakout phase at this stage.

Key support is aligned with the 20-day SMA around 76.23, followed by the recent intraday low near 77.19 acting as a secondary short-term floor due to repeated testing. A break below this zone could expose the 75.00 psychological level. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 77.81, with a clean break potentially opening the path toward 78.50 in the near term if momentum improves.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy in the short term, with dip-buying opportunities near the 76.20–77.00 support zone offering favorable risk-reward. Conservative traders may wait for a decisive breakout above 77.81 to confirm renewed bullish momentum before adding long exposure. Protective stops below 75.00 help guard against downside acceleration if broader sentiment weakens unexpectedly.
